case_title: JOE AMATO ET AL VS. ROSA RUIZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-25-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-25-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFFS WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS' AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMATO, JOE AMATO, SUZANNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUIZ, ROSA $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $490.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF AMATO, JOE AMATO, SUZANNE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY AMATO, JOE AMATO, SUZANNE AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, ROSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-17-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, ROSA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, ROSA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMATO, JOE AMATO, SUZANNE AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, ROSA
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, ROSA ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
